interpretive_note.ess_outlier: ESS (Expected Simplex Skewness) systematically overestimates in high-dimensional spaces with cluster structure and non-uniform density. TwoNN and MLE are the reliable estimators for ANN regime classification.
interpretive_note.regime: INTERMEDIATE-LOW (ID~13-16, closer to SIFT~10 than GloVe~20)
interpretive_note.vamana_prognosis: FAVORABLE: beam expected to grow slowly or be near-flat; significantly better than GloVe. Likely in the sublinear regime based on ID proximity to SIFT.
interpretive_note.key_caveat: Sentence embeddings cluster by semantic topic — this anisotropic structure can make effective ID lower than the raw estimator and actually HELPS ANN (shorter greedy paths to true neighbors).
